title: 5pcs Fuumuui Dual-Layer Synthetic Hair Flat Grainer Brush Set- Professional Flat Comb Brushes for Unique Texture Painting Perfect for Acrylic, Watercolour
features: Premium Dual-Layer Flat Grainer Brush - At the heart of this brush lies its innovative dual-layer synthetic bristle structure, combining two distinct fiber types to deliver the best of both worlds. The inner layer of bristles is soft and fine, designed to absorb water and pigment efficiently, ensuring smooth and even color application during washes without interruptions or streaks. The outer bristles are slightly firmer and more elastic, giving the brush exceptional spring and shape retention. It allows for creating repeated parallel lines, broken patterns, and natural effects, such as wood grain, grass fields, animal fur, fabric texture, feathers, and more with just a few strokes

Premium Materials for Long-lasting Use - Crafted with high-quality synthetic bristles, strong, flexible, long-lasting that hold shape, resist splitting, offer excellent paint control and spring for smooth, and are easy to clean with acrylics, oils and watercolors. Its durable, seamless nickel-plated brass ferrule keeps bristles firmly attached, while the polished hardwood handle (finished with three coats of paint) ensures comfort even during extended use

Professional Brushes Set - This set includes five different sizes (2, 4, 6, 8,10 ), giving you flexibility for any type of artwork. The smaller sizes are ideal for adding fine details, thin lines, and small decorative effects, while the larger sizes are perfect for covering big areas, building layered backgrounds, or quickly creating texture on walls, furniture, and larger canvases, that ensure you always have the right brush at hand, no matter what project you are working on

Effortless Artistic Expression – What makes the Grainer Brush truly special is its ability to save time while expanding creative options. Normally, achieving complex textures requires multiple layers and techniques, but with this brush you can produce impressive effects in just a few strokes. It allows beginners to create professional-looking textures easily, while giving advanced artists a powerful tool for pushing their creativity further

Wide Application - This flat grainer brush set is perfect for use with acrylics, oil, gouache, watercolor, inks, or other media of choice on smooth to lightly textured surfaces including canvas, paper, wood, metal, glass, fabric, ceramics, and more
